notes: Replaced placeholder design-token fields with a concrete draft baseline for spacing, typography, color, radius, shadow, and grid.
Bound the draft baseline to the current styling layer by exposing matching CSS variables in src/app/globals.css without remapping the existing shadcn theme tokens.
Kept unresolved aesthetic choices explicit in notes and open decisions instead of presenting the baseline as a finalized system contract.
open_issues: Current product surfaces still use local Tailwind values and are not yet normalized against the new draft token baseline.
The display typeface remains Geist-based for now and may need a later review if a distinct editorial display family becomes necessary.
